name: RAK-Feeling Matt Finish Colored Sanitarywares | Africa
description: Make a statement in your bathrooms with matt finished coloured toilets paired with colored toilet seats, washbasins and shower trays that come in trendy colors of black, cappuccino, grey, greige and white.

name: Hollinaze Dresser and Mirror
description: Grace your restful retreat with an added dose of refinement. The Hollinaze dresser with mirror showcases a stunning rich brown wood tone, with sleek drawer pulls for an added layer of luxury. A rounded top and mirror frame soften the silhouette, elevating the look. It’s curated, contemporary and utterly chic.
